name: Zen Signature Credit Card
exclusions: reward point cash redemption value revised by Kotak from June 2025
milestoneBenefits: 7,500 bonus Zen points on spending Rs 3,00,000 in an anniversary year
15,000 bonus Zen points on spending Rs 6,00,000 in an anniversary year
additionalBenefits: 10 Zen points for every Rs 150 spent on shopping categories like lifestyle goods, jewellery, departmental stores and apparel
5 Zen points for every Rs 150 on other eligible spends

salaried: Applicant must meet Kotak's eligibility criteria
selfEmployed: Applicant must meet Kotak's eligibility criteria
